text:
On 5 Nov 1999, Kent Boortz wrote:

> >Synopsis:       This is a port of a Swedish dictionary to ispell
[...]
> 
>         This is a port of a Swedish dictionary to ispell. I saw
>         there where ports for other languages so why not do

Why can't this and the br-ispell just be incorporated into the 
current ispell port, which already supports multiple languages?
